meta.title: PremiumBrain — Your Company's Intelligent Memory
meta.description: Transform your company knowledge into an AI-powered brain. Every document, video, and meeting — instantly searchable, in any language.

hero.headline:
Your Company Knows
More Than It Remembers
hero.subheadline: Cut onboarding time by 60%. Give every employee — in every language — instant access to everything your company has ever known.
hero.ctaSub: See it work with your own data

problem.label: The Problem
problem.headline: Your Knowledge Is Trapped
problem.description: Critical company knowledge lives in scattered documents, training videos, meeting recordings, and the heads of people who leave. Every time an employee quits, you lose institutional memory.

stats.searchTimeLabel: of work time spent searching for information
stats.knowledgeLossLabel: of institutional knowledge lost with employee turnover
stats.trainingCostLabel: average cost of onboarding a single new hire

solution.label: The Solution
solution.headline: One Brain. Every Language. All Knowledge.
solution.description: PremiumBrain ingests your entire company knowledge base — PDFs, videos, audio, documents — and makes it instantly accessible to every team member, in their native language.

upload.title: Upload Everything
upload.description: PDFs, training videos, manuals, meeting recordings, SOPs — drop it all in.

analyze.title: AI Analyzes Deeply
analyze.description: Videos are visually analyzed, not just transcribed. If a machine is set to 100°, PremiumBrain captures it — even if nobody said it.

query.title: Ask in Any Language
query.description: Your team asks questions in their language. PremiumBrain answers in their language. Automatically.

multimodal.title: Multimodal Analysis
multimodal.description: Goes beyond transcription. Visually analyzes training videos, identifies on-screen settings, procedures, and demonstrations that speech alone misses.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Intelligence
multilingual.description: Employees ask in their language, get answers in their language. Supports automatic language detection based on user preferences.

voice.title: Voice-First Interface
voice.description: Mobile app lets employees speak directly to the company brain. Perfect for warehouse floors, kitchen staff, or field technicians.

automation.title: Automated Workflows
automation.description: Automatically creates tasks from meetings, prioritizes ideas by urgency, and generates meeting summaries — zero manual effort.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Your data stays yours. Role-based access, encrypted storage, and compliance-ready infrastructure for regulated industries.

integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.description: Connects with existing tools — Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, and custom APIs. No workflow disruption.

heroBullets.video: Reads machine displays and on-screen settings from training videos
heroBullets.settings: Extracts temperatures, pressures, and calibration data automatically
heroBullets.procedures: Identifies step-by-step procedures that speech alone misses

socialProof.label: Built & Used by Us
socialProof.headline:
We Don't Just Build It.
We Run Our Business On It.
socialProof.description: PremiumBrain started as our own internal tool. Every Google Meet is recorded, transcribed, and searchable. Tasks are auto-generated. Ideas are auto-prioritized. We built it because we needed it — and now it's yours.

chris.quote: We built PremiumBrain because we were drowning in our own meeting recordings. Now every decision, every idea, every context is instantly findable. Our new hires onboard in days, not weeks.
chris.name: Chris Müller

lutfiya.quote: As a data scientist, I'm obsessed with making knowledge accessible. PremiumBrain doesn't just transcribe — it understands. It reads machine settings from video, detects languages automatically, and connects dots that humans miss.
lutfiya.name: Dr. Lutfiya Miller

community.name: Community
community.description: Access our ready-built tools, expert community, and learning resources.

custom.name: Custom Solution
custom.description: A PremiumBrain built specifically for your company — your data, your languages, your workflows.

items.question: What types of data can PremiumBrain process?
items.answer: PremiumBrain handles PDFs, Word documents, training videos, audio recordings, meeting transcripts, presentations, spreadsheets, and plain text files. Our multimodal analysis goes beyond text — we visually analyze video content to capture information that's never spoken aloud.

items.question: How does the multilingual feature work?
items.answer: PremiumBrain automatically detects each user's language preference and responds accordingly. Your German technician can ask in German, your French manager in French, and your English-speaking CEO in English — all querying the same knowledge base. No translation setup required.

items.question: Is our data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We use role-based access controls, and your company's knowledge base is completely isolated from other clients. We're built for industries with strict compliance requirements.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: For a custom solution, initial setup takes 1-2 weeks depending on the volume of existing data. We handle the entire ingestion process and train your team on using the system. Most teams are productive within the first day.

items.question: Can we try it with our own data before committing?
items.answer: Yes! That's exactly what our demo call is for. Bring some of your own documents or data, and we'll show you PremiumBrain processing and answering questions about YOUR company knowledge — live.

items.question: What makes PremiumBrain different from ChatGPT or other AI tools?
items.answer: ChatGPT knows the internet. PremiumBrain knows YOUR company. It's a dedicated RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system trained exclusively on your data. It doesn't hallucinate about your processes — it retrieves verified answers from your actual documents, videos, and recordings.

cta.headline: Ready to Give Your Company a Brain?
cta.description: See PremiumBrain in action with YOUR company knowledge. Bring your data. We'll do the rest.
cta.note: 15 minutes · Your data · We'll show you answers your team can't find today

footer.description: Enterprise knowledge intelligence that speaks every language.
